svg.title: lazy-alchemy v2 — table access lifecycle
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full path of a table access request in lazy-alchemy v2, from user code through cache lookup, optional SA2 reflection, and return of a CustomTable or async await path.
svg.text: Table access lifecycle — sync path (left) and async path (right)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does lazy_db attribute access work in lazy-alchemy v2?')
sendPrompt('What does LazyDBProp.__get__ do in lazy-alchemy?')
sendPrompt('How does the module-level cache work in lazy-alchemy v2?')
sendPrompt('What error does lazy-alchemy raise for missing tables?')
sendPrompt('How does SQLAlchemy 2 autoload_with reflection work?')
sendPrompt('What can I do with a CustomTable in lazy-alchemy v2?')
sendPrompt('How does await lazy_db.get() work in lazy-alchemy v2?')
sendPrompt('What does AsyncLazyDBAccessor.get do in lazy-alchemy?')
sendPrompt('How does async SQLAlchemy connection work in lazy-alchemy v2?')
